text:
Fatal trap 12: page fault while in kernel mode
fault virtual address   = 0xf4
fault code              = supervisor read, page not present
instruction pointer     = 0x8:0xc01df970
stack pointer           = 0x10:0xc0367d50
frame pointer           = 0x10:0xc0367d5c
code segment            = base 0x0, limit 0xfffff, type 0x1b
                        = DPL 0, pres 1, def32 1, gran 1
processor eflags        = interrupt enabled, resume, IOPL = 0
current process         = idle
interrupt mask          = bio
trap number             = 12
panic: page fault
syncing disks 96 96 96 ....
giving up on 32 buffers

How-To-Repeat: Allways. On two mashine. I can't install FreeBSD.
